title: New AI Blood Test Could Change Cancer Screening for Thousands
subtitle: A new tool aims to reduce painful exams for women while speeding up cancer diagnosis across the NHS.

summary.en: A new AI-powered blood test is being introduced by NHS hospitals to identify signs of cancer more effectively. The test, known as PinPoint, helps doctors rule out cancer in low-risk patients without the need for uncomfortable procedures. This development follows recent efforts to improve diagnostic speeds for women's health issues. Thousands of women referred for womb cancer checks could soon avoid invasive tests. Experts believe this technology will save time for both patients and medical staff.
summary.zh: 英國國家醫療保健服務（NHS）正引進一項全新的人工智慧血液檢測技術，以更有效地識別癌症徵兆。這項名為 PinPoint 的檢測能協助醫師在低風險病患身上排除癌症，免除不適的檢查程序。此發展延續了近期提升女性健康診斷速度的努力。每年數千名因疑似子宮癌而轉診的女性，未來有望免於接受侵入性檢查。專家認為，這項技術將能為病患與醫療人員節省時間。

paragraphs.en: Following recent efforts to speed up medical diagnoses across the UK, a new AI-powered blood test is set to change how the NHS investigates potential cancer cases. This new development, which focuses on identifying cancer risks through blood analysis, aims to spare thousands of women from undergoing painful and intrusive examinations every year. This follows yesterday’s news regarding new rapid tests for endometriosis, showing a broader trend of using modern technology to improve women’s healthcare.
paragraphs.zh: 隨著英國近期致力於加速醫療診斷，一項全新的人工智慧血液檢測技術即將改變英國國家醫療保健服務（NHS）調查潛在癌症病例的方式。這項新發展專注於透過血液分析來識別癌症風險，旨在每年讓數千名女性免於接受痛苦且具侵入性的檢查。在此之前，昨日才剛傳出關於子宮內膜異位症快速檢測的新消息，顯示出利用現代科技改善女性醫療保健的廣泛趨勢。

paragraphs.en: According to The Guardian Health, around 90,000 postmenopausal women in England are referred by their doctors each year because of heavy bleeding, which can be a sign of womb cancer. Under the current system, these women must undergo a transvaginal ultrasound scan—a procedure where a device is placed inside the body to check the lining of the womb. While this is a standard part of the diagnostic process, many patients find the experience uncomfortable or painful. The new PinPoint blood test offers a way to safely identify who actually needs these scans and who does not.
paragraphs.zh: 根據《衛報健康》（The Guardian Health）報導，英格蘭每年約有九萬名停經後女性因嚴重出血而被醫師轉診，這可能是子宮癌的徵兆。在現行制度下，這些女性必須接受經陰道超音波掃描，這是一種將儀器置入體內以檢查子宮內膜的程序。雖然這是診斷過程中的標準步驟，但許多病患認為這種體驗既不舒服又痛苦。這項名為「PinPoint」的新型血液檢測，提供了一種安全的方式，能辨識出誰真正需要這些掃描，而誰並不需要。

paragraphs.en: Developed by a Leeds-based company, the PinPoint test uses machine learning—a type of computer technology that learns patterns from data—to analyze 30 different markers in a patient's blood. By looking at these markers, the system can determine if a person is at low, elevated, or high risk of having cancer. The Guardian Health reports that in a trial involving over 16,000 patients, the test showed a 99% accuracy rate in detecting gynaecological cancers and, just as importantly, in ruling out the presence of the disease.
paragraphs.zh: 由一家位於里茲（Leeds）的公司所開發，PinPoint 檢測運用了機器學習——一種能從數據中學習模式的電腦技術——來分析病患血液中的三十種不同標記。透過觀察這些標記，該系統能判定病患罹患癌症的風險是屬於低、中或高風險。《衛報健康》報導指出，在一項涉及超過一萬六千名病患的試驗中，該檢測在偵測婦科癌症以及排除疾病存在方面，皆展現了百分之九十九的準確度。

paragraphs.en: For many patients, this technology could provide a much faster and less stressful experience. Dr. Jacinta Walsh, a GP in West Yorkshire, noted that it currently often takes up to six visits to a doctor before they can officially rule out cancer. She explained that the new test will help shorten this process, giving patients peace of mind much earlier while also freeing up time for doctors to see other patients who need urgent care. By identifying low-risk cases quickly, the NHS can focus its resources on those who truly require further investigation.
paragraphs.zh: 對許多病患而言，這項技術能提供更快速且壓力較小的體驗。西約克郡（West Yorkshire）的家庭醫師華許（Jacinta Walsh）博士指出，目前病患通常需要看診多達六次，才能正式排除罹癌的可能性。她解釋說，這項新檢測將有助於縮短此流程，讓病患能更早獲得安心，同時也能騰出時間讓醫師診治其他需要緊急照護的病患。透過快速識別低風險病例，NHS 可以將資源集中在真正需要進一步調查的對象身上。

paragraphs.en: Medical professionals have welcomed the news. Prof. Sean Duffy, the chief medical officer for the company behind the test, described the 99% accuracy rate as remarkable by any clinical standard. He emphasized that the true value of the test lies in its ability to safely identify women who are at very low risk, allowing them to avoid invasive procedures that they do not actually need. Brent Kilmurray, the chief executive of the Mid Yorkshire NHS trust, added that there is an especially compelling case for hospitals to adopt this technology, particularly for detecting gynaecological cancers.
paragraphs.zh: 醫療專業人員對此消息表示歡迎。該檢測開發公司的首席醫療官達菲（Sean Duffy）教授形容，百分之九十九的準確度以任何臨床標準來看都相當驚人。他強調，這項檢測真正的價值在於它能安全地識別出風險極低的女性，讓她們免於接受其實並不需要的侵入性程序。中約克郡 NHS 信託基金會（Mid Yorkshire NHS trust）執行長基爾莫瑞（Brent Kilmurray）補充說，醫院採用這項技術的理由特別充分，尤其是在偵測婦科癌症方面。

paragraphs.en: Despite the excitement, experts remain aware of the challenges that come with current diagnostic methods. Tracy Jackson, a consultant gynaecologist at the Leeds trust, explained that doctors are very aware that current investigations can be uncomfortable. She noted that because most women referred for these checks do not actually have cancer, finding a way to reduce unnecessary testing is a top priority. The PinPoint test represents a significant step toward that goal, as it could save one in five referred women—about 18,000 people a year—from needing a transvaginal scan.
paragraphs.zh: 儘管感到振奮，專家們仍意識到現行診斷方法所帶來的挑戰。里茲信託基金會的婦科顧問醫師傑克森（Tracy Jackson）解釋說，醫師們非常清楚目前的調查方式可能令人不適。她指出，由於大多數被轉診進行這些檢查的女性其實並未罹癌，因此尋找減少不必要檢查的方法是首要任務。PinPoint 檢測代表了朝此目標邁出的重要一步，因為它每年可能讓五分之一的轉診女性，約一萬八千人，免於接受經陰道掃描。

paragraphs.en: As the NHS begins to introduce this technology in hospitals across Yorkshire, many are watching to see how it will affect patient outcomes on a larger scale. The shift toward AI-assisted diagnostics is part of a wider move to modernize the health service. By using statistical analysis of medical data, the NHS hopes to move away from a 'one-size-fits-all' approach to cancer screening. If the rollout proves successful in these initial hospitals, it is likely that the use of such AI tools will expand, potentially changing the standard of care for many other types of cancer in the future. For now, the focus remains on ensuring that patients receive the right care at the right time, without the need for unnecessary pain.
paragraphs.zh: 隨著 NHS 開始在約克郡各地的醫院引進這項技術，許多人正密切關注它將如何在大規模範圍內影響病患的治療成效。這種轉向人工智慧輔助診斷的趨勢，是醫療服務現代化大方向的一部分。透過對醫療數據進行統計分析，NHS 希望能擺脫癌症篩檢「一體適用」的模式。如果這項推廣在這些初期醫院證明成功，未來很有可能擴大使用此類人工智慧工具，進而改變許多其他癌症類型的照護標準。目前，重點仍放在確保病患能在正確的時間獲得正確的照護，且無需承受不必要的痛苦。

keyTerms.definitionEn: To prevent someone from experiencing something unpleasant or difficult.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 使某人免受（不愉快或困難的）經歷。
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作形容詞（多餘的）或動詞（撥出時間/金錢），這裡指「免除」。文中：This new development, which focuses on identifying cancer risks through blood analysis, aims to spare thousands of women from undergoing painful and intrusive examinations every year.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To decide that something is not possible or not the cause of a problem.
keyTerms.noteZh: 由 rule 和 out 組成，意思與字面拆解不同，指排除可能性。文中：The Guardian Health reports that in a trial involving over 16,000 patients, the test showed a 99% accuracy rate in detecting gynaecological cancers and, just as importantly, in ruling out the presence of the disease.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To make something available for use by removing other tasks or people.
keyTerms.noteZh: 指透過減少工作量來騰出資源。文中：She explained that the new test will help shorten this process, giving patients peace of mind much earlier while also freeing up time for doctors to see other patients who need urgent care.

keyTerms.definitionEn: Evoking interest, attention, or admiration in a powerful way; convincing.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 令人信服的、強而有力的。
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見於「強迫」的動詞 compel，這裡作形容詞，指理由充分且具說服力。文中：Brent Kilmurray, the chief executive of the Mid Yorkshire NHS trust, added that there is an especially compelling case for hospitals to adopt this technology, particularly for detecting gynaecological cancers.

sources.name: The Guardian Health
sources.title: Thousands of women could be spared painful cancer exam by new NHS AI blood test

previousArticles.title: New Rapid Tests Offer Hope for Faster Endometriosis Diagnosis
previousArticles.summaryEn: New medical tests are being introduced to the NHS in England and Wales to help identify endometriosis more quickly. The condition affects one in 10 women and currently takes an average of nine years to diagnose. Two new non-invasive tests, a saliva test and a gut sensor, have received draft approval to assist doctors. These tools aim to reduce the need for painful surgery as a first step in the diagnostic process. Experts believe these tests will significantly improve the quality of life for many patients.

quiz.question: According to the article, how does the PinPoint test determine a patient's cancer risk?

options.A: By performing a transvaginal ultrasound scan on the patient.
options.B: By using machine learning to analyze 30 different markers in the blood.
options.C: By conducting a series of six routine doctor visits over several months.
options.D: By comparing the patient's symptoms with a database of 16,000 previous cases.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第三段，PinPoint 測試利用機器學習技術，分析患者血液中的 30 種標記物來判斷癌症風險。選項 A 是目前的常規檢查，而非新測試的方法。選項 C 是目前診斷過程的耗時情況，而非測試機制。選項 D 混淆了測試的準確度數據（16,000 名患者的試驗）與其運作原理。

quiz.question: What can be inferred about the current diagnostic process for postmenopausal women with heavy bleeding?

options.A: It is highly effective at identifying cancer in the vast majority of cases.
options.B: It is considered the most modern and comfortable method available.
options.C: It leads to many women undergoing invasive procedures they do not actually require.
options.D: It is exclusively performed by doctors in Leeds-based medical facilities.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。根據文章第六段，大多數被轉診進行檢查的女性實際上並未罹患癌症，且醫生希望能減少不必要的檢查。這暗示目前的診斷流程（transvaginal ultrasound）導致許多未患病者接受了不必要的侵入性檢查。選項 A 與文意相反，因為大多數人並未患癌。選項 B 明顯錯誤，因為文章提到該過程通常被認為不舒服或痛苦。選項 D 僅提到開發公司位於 Leeds，並未限制檢查地點。

quiz.question: In the fourth paragraph, what does the word 'rule out' mean in the context of the doctor's explanation?

options.A: To officially conclude that something is not present.
options.B: To create a strict set of regulations for medical staff.
options.C: To prevent patients from entering the doctor's office.
options.D: To measure the exact size of a tumor during a scan.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 A。在文中『rule out cancer』是指醫生通過診斷過程，確認患者沒有罹患癌症。選項 B 與法規無關。選項 C 完全偏離語境。選項 D 雖然與檢查有關，但『rule out』是邏輯上的排除，而非測量行為。此詞彙在醫學語境中常指排除特定疾病的可能性。

quiz.question: What is the primary message of the article regarding the new AI-powered blood test?

options.A: It will completely replace all existing cancer screening methods in the UK.
options.B: It is a revolutionary tool that aims to improve women's healthcare by reducing unnecessary, invasive examinations.
options.C: It is primarily designed to help doctors in Leeds earn more money through new technology.
options.D: It focuses on the history of medical diagnostics in the UK over the last century.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。文章的核心在於介紹 PinPoint 測試如何透過 AI 技術，幫助 NHS 減少女性在檢查過程中面臨的不適與侵入性程序。選項 A 過於絕對，文中僅提到它是診斷過程的改進，而非完全取代。選項 C 錯誤，文章未提及獲利動機。選項 D 錯誤，文章聚焦於現代技術的應用，而非歷史回顧。

aiDisclaimer: 本文由 AI 綜合多家報導生成，事實請以原始來源為準。
